Package dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsReflect

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsReflect
public final class JkUtilsReflect extends Object
Utility class for dealing with reflection

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    JkUtilsReflect.ReflectionInvocationHandler
    Proxy Invocation handler, that delegate to target instance via reflection

    createReflectionProxy(Class<T> interfaze, Object target)
    Create a Dynamic proxy with the specified interface, delagating call to the target object.

    findMethodMethodDeclaration(Class<?> clazz, String name, Class<?>... argTypes)
    Find a method of the given name and argument type on the specified class or its parent classes.

    getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, boolean includeSuperClass)
    Returns all fields declared in the class passed as argument or and its super classes.

    getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)
    Returns all fields declared in the class passed as argument or its super classes annotated with the supplied annotation.

    Gets the field having the specified name on the specified object.

  • Constructor Details

    • JkUtilsReflect

      public JkUtilsReflect()

  • Method Details

    • setAccessibleIfNeeded

      public static void setAccessibleIfNeeded(Field field)
      Sets the specified field to accessible if not already done.

    • methodWithSameNameAndArgType

      public static Method methodWithSameNameAndArgType(Method original, Class<?> targetClass)
      Returns a method from the target class that has the same name and same argument types then the specified one. Argument types are compared on name base to handle different classloaders.

    • methodsHavingName

      public static List<Method> methodsHavingName(Class clazz, String name)

    • getTypesOf

      public static Class<?>[] getTypesOf(Object[] params)
      Returns an array of the types of specified objects.

    • getFieldValue

      public static <T> T getFieldValue(Object object, Field field)
      Same as Field.get(Object) but throwing only unchecked exceptions.

    • setFieldValue

      public static void setFieldValue(Object object, Field field, Object value)
      Sets the specified value for the specified field and object. Field is marked as 'accessible' if not already done.

    • getFieldValue

      public static Object getFieldValue(Object object, String fieldName)
      Gets the value of the field having the specified name on a given object.

    • getField

      public static Field getField(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName)
      Gets the field having the specified name on the specified object.

    • newInstance

      public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz)
      Instantiates the given class.

    • newInstance

      public static <T> T newInstance(Class<T> clazz, Class<?> parameterType, Object parameter)
      Instantiates the given class using a constructor with specified single argument.

    • invoke

      public static <T> T invoke(Object target, String methodName)
      Invokes the specified method on the given object.

    • invoke

      public static <T> T invoke(Object target, Method method)
      Invokes the specified method on the given object.

    • invoke

      public static <V> V invoke(Object target, Method method, Object... params)
      Invokes the specified method on the given object.

    • getMethod

      public static Method getMethod(Class<?> clazz, String name, Class<?>... argTypes)
      Same as Class.getMethod(String, Class...) but throwing only unchecked exceptions.

    • getMethodOrNull

      public static Method getMethodOrNull(Class<?> clazz, String name, Class<?>... argTypes)
      Returns the method of the given name and argument type on the specified class. If none, this method returns null.

    • getDeclaredMethod

      public static Method getDeclaredMethod(Class<?> clazz, String name, Class<?>... argTypes)
      Returns the method of the given name and argument type on the specified class.

    • findMethodMethodDeclaration

      public static Method findMethodMethodDeclaration(Class<?> clazz, String name, Class<?>... argTypes)
      Find a method of the given name and argument type on the specified class or its parent classes.

    • isMethodPublicIn

      public static boolean isMethodPublicIn(Class<?> clazz, String method, Class<?>... args)
      Returns whether the specified method signature is declared in the specified class.

    • getInheritedAnnotation

      public static <T extends Annotation> T getInheritedAnnotation(Method method, Class<T> annotationClass)
      Returns the annotation declared on a given method. If no annotation is declared on the method, then annotation is searched in parent classes.

    • getInheritedAnnotation

      public static <T extends Annotation> T getInheritedAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<T> annotationClass, String methodName, Class<?>... argTypes)
      Returns the annotation declared on a given method. If no annotation is declared on the method, then annotation is searched in parent classes.

    • getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation

      public static List<Field> getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)
      Returns all fields declared in the class passed as argument or its super classes annotated with the supplied annotation.

    • getDeclaredMethodsWithAnnotation

      public static List<Method> getDeclaredMethodsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, Class<? extends Annotation> annotationClass)
      Retrieves a list of methods declared in the specified class that are annotated with a given annotation.
      Parameters:
      clazz - the class to search for methods
      annotationClass - the annotation type to look for on the methods
      Returns:
      a list of methods declared in the specified class that are annotated with the provided annotation

    • getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation

      public static List<Field> getDeclaredFieldsWithAnnotation(Class<?> clazz, boolean includeSuperClass)
      Returns all fields declared in the class passed as argument or and its super classes.

    • invokeStaticMethod

      public static <T> T invokeStaticMethod(Class<?> clazz, String methodName, Object... args)
      Invokes a static method with the specified arguments
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class the method is invoked on.
      methodName - The method name to invoke
      args - The argument values the method is invoked with.

    • invokeInstanceMethod

      public static <T> T invokeInstanceMethod(Object instance, String methodName, Object... args)
      Invokes an instance method with the specified arguments
      Parameters:
      instance - The instance the method is invoked on.
      methodName - The method name to invoke
      args - The argument values the method is invoked with.

    • toString

      public static String toString(Object object)
      Returns a string representation of the given object.

    • createReflectionProxy

      public static <T> T createReflectionProxy(Class<T> interfaze, Object target)
      Create a Dynamic proxy with the specified interface, delagating call to the target object.
